this will never met requirement. disabled for now.
responses: ($self$) 触发了$self$向$target$打招呼的口上

entries_list._comment: this event fire when character could be disrupted in sleep. this will be called when (1, there is direct interaction) (2, no direct interaction but self is light sleep)

responses: <color=#373737>($self$) 时停中的$self$对$epDescription$一点反应也没有</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) 熟睡中的$self$被$epDescription$造成的痛楚干扰到</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) 睡梦中的$self$被$epDescription$造成的痛楚干扰到</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) 睡梦中的$self$貌似感觉到了$epDescription$，interrupt判定</color>

entries_list._comment: trigger. Fires when anyone else executes AP in same room, check if Self action should be modified
entries_list._comment2: Player is allowed to call interrupt on others, but response text will not display (results will get executed)
entries_list._comment4: fired when [target] start new action, or when [self] move into [target] room

variants._comment: this variant triggers when a chara is doing something in same room as sleeping character but the action does not include sleeping chara. For direct disruption, its hardcoded.

interrupt does not check self AP, selftags will mostly be [], so to remedy this, this response will trigger an event with eventInstance.Self == target, and inject self as argument, letting the event take care of validating everything

entries_list._comment: Event trigger, fired when character wakes up (or regains consciousness). Due to fault in design, this event will launch using relationship self -> self

responses: <color=#373737>($self$) $self$对身体的异样感觉感到了疑惑</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) $self$醒来的时候发现内衣被脱了</color>
<color=#373737>($self$) $self$醒来的时候在身上发现了精液</color>

entries_list._comment: Same trigger as OnWakeUp, but this one is used instead if night assault in progress when triggered. use Relationship self -> target

responses: 尽管被吵醒，但$self$并没有对$target$的行为表露出反感……
<color=#373737>注意到内衣被脱下，但$self$也并没有遮掩的打算</color>
<color=#373737> $self$醒来的时候在身上发现了精液</color>

entries_list._comment: Same trigger as OnNightAssaultSuccess, but fires only when assault refused and terminated

responses: ($self$) 被惊醒的$self$下意识地推开了$target$
<color=#373737>感觉到了身体的快感，$self$立刻就明白自己在梦中被$target$做了什么</color>
<color=#373737>终于注意到身上的精液，$self$的脸色变得惨白</color>

zh-cn.kojo_default_com_touch_head_refuse_1: "哎…这样不太好吧？" $self$有些为难地皱了皱眉。
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_touch_head_refuse_2: "等等！今天发型可是特意弄的，别乱摸！" $self$连忙后退一步，躲开了$target$伸过来的手。
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_touch_head_accept_failu: "……好吧。" $self$勉强挤出一个笑容，任由$target$摸着自己的头
"……算了，随便你吧。" $self$叹了口气，放弃了抵抗。
$self$默默地忍受着头上的触碰，身体却因触碰而绷紧。
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_touch_head_accept_succe: $self$没有说话，只是微微垂下眼帘，嘴角露出一丝不易察觉的微笑
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_farm_cultivate_crop: $self$："种田啊…… 要不你找个更有经验的？"
$self$："一起种田？ 还是算了吧, 我怕我会拖你后腿"
"这苗是不是埋得太浅了点？" $self$看着歪歪扭扭的幼苗，忍不住皱起了眉头
"……算了，就这样吧，反正能长出来就行。" $self$看着参差不齐的田地叹了口气
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_farm_maintain_accep: $self$ 一边哼着歌，一边认真地给作物浇水施肥。
$self$："完了，刚才除草的时候，不小心把菜苗也拔掉了！"
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_production_cooking_: $self$：“完了，盐放太多了！要不还是吃泡面吧……”
$self$：“呼…总算按着菜谱一步一步做出来了”
$self$：“完成了！嗯，至少外观是对的……希望味道别太奇怪。”
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_fai: $self$在吸尘的时候不小心把某些重要的资料吸进去了！
$self$在整理桌子的时候不小心打翻了水杯！
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_suc: $self$看着整洁的房间，满意地点了点头。
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_furniture_playVideoGame: $self$："抱歉，我现在没什么心情玩游戏"
$self$："你挺厉害的嘛！下次我一定赢回来！"
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_interaction_talk_accept: "嗯……是啊，挺好的。"$self$说着却目光飘忽，明显没在听。
"所以……你到底想说什么？"$self$微微歪头，语气中带着一丝不耐。
"嗯……大概吧。"$self$含糊地回应，看起来只是想快点结束话题。
"真的假的？太搞笑了吧！"$self$笑出声来
$self$："「你讲得挺有意思的，不继续了吗？"
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_furniture_watchVideo_ac: 「……这半小时真是浪费人生。」$self$一脸精疲力尽。
「这部影片意外地不错哎！」$self$露出灿烂的笑容
「好久没笑得这么开心了。」 $self$边笑边擦眼角的泪水
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_furniture_takingBreak_a: $self$轻轻滑动解锁手机屏幕，然后单手随意地刷着内容。
$self$从小包装里抓了点脆零食放进嘴里。
$self$解开耳机线，戴上后轻轻点着头跟着节奏。
$self$慢慢地抿了一口咖啡，然后双手静静地握着杯子。

en-us.kojo_default_com_touch_head_refuse_1: "Uh…isn't this a little inappropriate?" $self$ frowned slightly, looking troubled.
en-us.kojo_default_com_touch_head_refuse_2: "Wait! I spent time doing my hair today, don't mess it up!" $self$ quickly took a step back, dodging $target$'s outstretched hand
en-us.kojo_default_com_touch_head_accept_failu: "…Alright." $self$ forced a smile, letting $target$ pat their head
"…whatever, do as you please." $self$ sighed, giving up resisting.
$self$ silently endured the touch on their head, but their body tensed up to the touch
en-us.kojo_default_com_touch_head_accept_succe: $self$ didn't say anything, but lowered their eyelids slightly, a faint smile appearing at the corner of their lips
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_farm_cultivate_crop: $self$: "Planting crops, huh... why don't you find someone more experienced to work with?"
$self$: "Planting crops together? Let's not do that, I'll probably be holding you back."
"isn't this seedling buried a little too shallow?" $self$ couldn't help but frown looking at the crooked seedling
"…whatever, let's just leave it like this, it'll grow just fine... hopefully." $self$ sighed, looking at the uneven field
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_farm_maintain_accep: $self$ hummed a song as they carefully watered and fertilized the crops.
$self$: "Oops, I accidentally pulled out the vegetable seedlings thinking they were weeds!"
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_production_cooking_: $self$: "God no, I put too much salt! I should probably serve instant noodles instead..."
$self$: "Phew… finally made it step by step according to the recipe。"
$self$: "Finished! Hmm, at least it has the right looks… hope it also taste right."
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_fai: $self$ accidentally sucked up some important documents with the vacuum cleaner!
$self$ knocked over a glass of water while cleaning the desk!
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_cleaning_accept_suc: $self$ looked at the tidied up room and nodded in satisfaction.
en-us.kojo_default_event_greeting_04: $self$ greets $target$ for the first time today.
en-us.kojo_default_event_disruptsleep_03: <color=#373737>($self$) 熟睡中的$self$对$epDescription$没有任何反应</color>
en-us.kojo_default_event_disruptsleep_06: <color=#373737>($self$) 睡眠中的$self$对$epDescription$没有任何反应</color>
en-us.kojo_default_event_disruptsleep_08: <color=#373737>$self$, lightly asleep, is disturbed by the noise of $epDescription$</color>
en-us.kojo_default_com_furniture_playVideoGame: $self$: "Sorry, I'm not really in the mood for games right now."
"Ugh… I can't believe I lost again" $self$ tosses the controller to the side
$self$: "That was… rough. Not really my kind of game."
$self$: "That was way more fun than I expected!"
$self$: "You're pretty good at this! I'll get you next time."
en-us.kojo_default_com_interaction_talk_accept: "Uh-huh… yeah. Sounds great." $self$ glances at something else mid-conversation, clearly tuned out.
"Is there a point to this, or…?" $self$ tilts her head slightly, impatience creeping into her tone.
"Mmm… I guess." $self$ replies vaguely, clearly just trying to end the topic.
"Wait, seriously? That’s hilarious." $self$ laughs out loud
$self$: "You’ve got good stories. Not gonna keep going?"
en-us.kojo_default_com_furniture_watchVideo_re: $self$: “Not really feeling like watching anything right now.”
en-us.kojo_default_com_furniture_watchVideo_ac: “...That was 30 minutes of my life I’m not getting back.”  $self$ looks utterly drained.
“Okay, that was actually really good!” $self$ smiles brightly
“I haven’t laughed that hard in ages.” $self$ wipes away a tear
en-us.kojo_default_com_furniture_takingBreak_r: $self$: “I’m fine. Sitting still just makes me restless.”
en-us.kojo_default_com_furniture_takingBreak_a: $self$ unlocks her cellphone screen with a flick, then idly scrolls with one thumb.
$self$ pulls something crunchy from a small pack and pops it into her mouth without looking.
$self$ untangles her earbuds and slips them in, nodding slightly to the beat.
$self$ takes a long sip from her cup, then quietly holds it with both hands.
